privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated ODT file and a text-based style guide, created entirely by setup_task.sh. I verified that the expected titles, chapter headings ('Introduction', 'The Crypt'), area subheadings, and monster names ('Ashen Cultist', 'Bone Golem', 'The Ashen King' after prefix removal) exactly match the Python-generated content. Additionally, I confirmed the presence of the required formatting labels ('Armor Class:', 'Hit Points:', etc.), the tags meant for removal ('[READ ALOUD]', '[END READ]', 'STAT BLOCK: '), the read-aloud substrings, and the 4-column encounter summary table content ('Bone Golem', 'Ashen Cultists', 'Deadly') based on the setup scripts.
